free_text: Cross sections of (p,x) reactions on molybdenum
target radiated by 660 MeV protons
Combined publication (in
Russian), see REL-REF
English Transl. of IZV,59,206
- cr.sect. of Ag-isotope
- cr.sect. of Ti,V,Ga,Ge isotopes
- cr.sect. of Zr isotopes
- cr.sect. of Sn isotopes
Thin targets of natural Mo, thickness 0.105 g/cm2
Time of irradiation was 10 min for first target
and 1 hour for another.
First spectrum was measured later on 50 min
after end of irradiation. 40 spectra were
measured during 3 months.
38 and 50 cm2
The error in the calibration of spectrometer.
Experimental errors of the measurements,
which do not include errors of the gamma-yields,
half-lives and monitor reaction cross section.

new date system.

Combined paper informs a reader, that cross section for
Y-88 production is cumulative one. This is mistake,
because cross section for Zr-88 production is larger,
than cross section for Y-88.
